subject: UW-Eau Claire student building salon websites
body:
Hey there,

I'm a UW-Eau Claire student and I've built a few websites for salons around here. I'd love to do one for Be Inspired Salon too.

I can create a custom draft and walk you through it on a quick call. You'll see everything before deciding—no pressure at all.

If it's a fit, great. If not, no hard feelings—I'm just trying to build my portfolio with real projects.

Let me know if you're interested.

Best,
Justice
715-308-7949
https://justicewastaken.github.io/forward-media/
